heading: EJSON.stringify()
body:
Serializes the provided JavaScript object to an [EJSON](manual/reference/mongodb-extended-json) string.

```typescript
EJSON.stringify(json: object): string
```

| Parameter | Type     | Description                                         |
| --------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| object    | document | An EJSON object. The object may contain BSON types. |
